name: Four-Tab Robot Handshake
description: Deploy four real browser tabs as robot limbs, switch among them to intercept eight moving phase relays, and merge their distributed interaction ledger into one identity proof.

metadata.notes: Full replacement of the rejected tutorial pilot. Four explicit same-origin browser tabs form a distributed robot body. Eight generated relays require real tab switching, directional keyboard drive, sustained pointer contact, and moving phase capture; the server independently replays every deployment, input transition, fixed tick, lock, charge decay, and relay.
